FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fd9d7284670>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-18T15:47:09Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-18T15:45:20Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-18T15:47:09Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-18T15:45:20Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/06/18 15:48:43.266505657 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266512768 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266729746 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266731399 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266751058 {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266751850 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266760803 new <- list()
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266761484 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266774103 new$width <- width
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266774824 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266789166 new$height <- height
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266789847 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266804459 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266805130 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266816627 new$title <- title
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266817088 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266825831 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266826272 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266834935 new$version <- version
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266835356 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266844099 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266844510 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266858010 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266858831 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266873453 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266874225 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266888306 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266889067 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266906894 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266907395 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266916879 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266917430 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266933664 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266934085 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266949338 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266950069 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266981587 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266982558 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267005393 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267006284 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267018192 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267018683 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267045484 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267047096 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267064783 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267065524 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267077772 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267078253 "default"))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267088459 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267088879 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267098013 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267098514 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267108429 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267108899 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267124102 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267124974 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267145264 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267145695 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267154308 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267154749 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267163372 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267163792 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267173497 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267189471 domain = NA)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267208450 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267208891 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267218054 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267218485 old$family <- family
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267228651 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267229352 version <- old$version
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267238055 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267238576 "2.0")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267247669 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267248130 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267258516 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267259026 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267272867 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267273649 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267289583 domain = NA)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267290053 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267300369 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267300830 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267312457 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267312978 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267324115 invisible()
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267325317 }

2026/06/18 15:48:43.266751058 {

2026/06/18 15:48:43.266774824 if (!missing(height))

2026/06/18 15:48:43.266825831 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266826272 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266834935 new$version <- version
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266835356 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266844099 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266844510 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266858010 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266858831 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266873453 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266874225 if (!missing(fg))

2026/06/18 15:48:43.266889067 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266906894 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/18 15:48:43.266907395 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/06/18 15:48:43.267018192 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267018683 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267045484 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267047096 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/18 15:48:43.267065524 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267077772 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267078253 "default"))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267088459 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267088879 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267098013 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267098514 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267108429 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267108899 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267124102 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/06/18 15:48:43.267145264 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267145695 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267154308 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267154749 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267163372 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267163792 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267173497 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267189471 domain = NA)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267208450 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267208891 }
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267218054 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267218485 old$family <- family
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267228651 }

2026/06/18 15:48:43.267258516 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/18 15:48:43.267259026 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/06/18 15:48:43.267290053 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
